name: Ocean Beach - The Forgotten City
overview: WBOC News special, "Ocean Beach - The Forgotten City," details Leon Ackerman's dream community development, which he was determined to build on Assateague Island. The special covers the origin, its challenges, government & local opposition, and a natural disaster leading to its eventual failure, and ultimate conversion into Assateague Island National Park.

trailers.title: We Get A Preview Of WBOC's News Special "Ocean Beach - The Forgotten City"
